mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_permission WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM sys_permission WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT p.* FROM sys_permission p JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} AND p.status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_permission (permission_name, permission_key, resource_type, path, component, parent_id, order_num, status, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{permissionName}, #{permissionKey}, #{resourceType}, #{path}, #{component}, #{parentId}, #{orderNum}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_permission SET permission_name = #{permissionName}, permission_key = #{permissionKey}, resource_type = #{resourceType}, path = #{path}, component = #{component}, parent_id = #{parentId}, order_num = #{orderNum}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
